Description: Tells an NPC that there's cover here

Keys.name: Node FOV
Keys.description: Imagine this node requires that an NPC be in the node's field of view in order to use this hint

Keys.name: Target Node
Keys.description: The node ID of an associated target node, if any

Keys.name: Ignore Facing
Keys.description: Don't pay attention to the facing of the node. May not apply to a given hint type

Keys.name: Minimum State
Keys.description: Require an NPC have a minimum state to use the hint. Seemingly always 1 in Titanfall

Keys.name: Maximum State
Keys.description: Require an NPC have a maximum state to use the hint. Seemingly always 3 in Titanfall
